mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, BOARD_TYPE, STOCK_ID, USER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, CREATE_DATE, MODIFY_DATE, DELETE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{req.boardType}, #{req.stockId}, #{req.userId}, #{req.title}, #{req.content}, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID AS postId, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, STOCK_ID AS stockId, USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_TITLE AS title, BOARD_CONTENT AS content, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCnt, CAST(CREATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP) AS createdAt, CAST(NVL(MODIFY_DATE, CREATE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP) AS updatedAt FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET STOCK_ID = #{req.stockId}, BOARD_TITLE = #{req.title}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{req.content}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
UPDATE BOARD SET DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
